content:
From: Carsten Fuhs <c.fuhs@bbk.ac.uk>
Subject: [isabelle] FSCD 2026: Free online participation, 20 - 23 July 2026

The organisers of FSCD 2026 are delighted to announce free best-effort
virtual participation in the 11th International Conference on Formal
Structures for Computation and Deduction (FSCD 2026) in Lisbon, 20 - 23
July 2026.

Please register your email in advance to receive login information for
the live stream. For details, please see the information on the
conference website:

https://fscd-conference.org/2026
